name: Multimodal Search Engine V2
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Unified multimodal index — hybrid vector + keyword search across text, image embeddings, code snippets, and audio transcriptions; cross-modal ranking, semantic reranking, faceted filtering by modality, and federated result merging

services.name: Azure AI Vision
services.purpose: Image understanding pipeline — visual embedding generation for similarity search, object detection and scene classification, OCR for text-in-image extraction, image captioning for text-based retrieval, visual question answering for cross-modal reasoning

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Audio-to-text pipeline — speech recognition for audio/video content indexing, speaker diarization for multi-speaker segments, timestamp-aligned transcriptions for audio search, language identification for multilingual content

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for cross-modal reasoning — natural language query understanding, cross-modal result synthesis (combining image + text + code results into coherent answers), query expansion across modalities, conversational search refinement, result summarization

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Search API and processing — query orchestration engine, modality-specific indexing pipelines, embedding generation workers, result ranking and fusion, search UI backend, cross-modal reasoning API

prod.note: 2 vCPU, 4GB, min 3 replicas, GPU for embeddings

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Multimodal content store — source images, audio files, code repositories, document archives, generated embeddings, thumbnail cache, indexing queue artifacts

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: AI service credentials, search admin keys, storage account keys, content source API tokens, embedding model signing keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Search quality metrics — query latency by modality, cross-modal relevance scores (MRR, NDCG), embedding generation throughput, indexing pipeline health, cache hit rates, user engagement and click-through

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine query expansion and simple result summarization — reserve GPT-4o for complex cross-modal reasoning (combining image + text + code results into coherent answers), saving 65% on AI costs

Implement embedding caching — once an image, audio file, or code snippet is embedded, store the vector in AI Search; re-embedding on content change only, not on every query; this eliminates 95% of Vision/Speech API calls

Use AI Search semantic ranker selectively — enable for natural language queries requiring deep understanding; disable for exact-match queries (code search, image ID lookup) where BM25 is sufficient and cheaper
Right-size Container Apps by modality — text search workers need CPU only while image embedding workers need GPU; use separate workload profiles to avoid paying for GPU on text-only queries

Implement progressive loading — return text results first (fastest), then image results, then audio results; users often find answers in the first modality returned, reducing unnecessary cross-modal processing
Use Blob Storage lifecycle management — move source content older than 90 days to cool tier; embeddings and index data stay in hot tier since they're actively queried regardless of content age
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
